_comment_multiPerformer: Duo/group super detection. A flagged invoice defaults to NO super withheld and shows a confirm prompt in the Review modal (Solo / this performer's share / no-super). variableLineupPerformers = performers who flip between solo and duo/group under ONE ABN (matched by name, case-insensitive) — this is the most reliable trigger and also catches the harp->two-harpists case the booking field misses. multiPerformerOfferings / ambiguousOfferings = exact 'What Did They End Up Booking?' values; the code ALSO keyword-matches (duo/trio/quartet/band/pair/group/ensemble/mariachi -> multi; soloist -> solo) so renamed values like 'Strings - Group (2 or more)' are caught automatically without editing this file.
_comment_knownSuppliers: Retail/AP suppliers (alcohol, etc.) that email tax invoices which are NOT contractor performance invoices. The Gmail reader reads each PDF's text and, if it matches a supplier's keywords or ABN, flags the row 'Supplier' and unticks it by default (you can still tick it in via the import-review modal). 'abn' is digits-only; keywords are matched case-insensitively against the PDF text + subject + sender. These often arrive forwarded internally, so sender-based exclusion alone misses them.
